context: Tests whether the agent includes the two mandatory visual review checkpoints specified in the skill — after the homepage phase (Phase 5) and after the navigation phase (Phase 7) — and whether the agent correctly specifies preview/unpublished theme deployment rather than live deployment for these review pushes.

checklist.name: Preview push after homepage phase
checklist.description: Runbook includes a step to push the theme to a preview or unpublished theme after the homepage is built (Phase 5 / after templates/index.json is complete)

checklist.name: Visual check after homepage
checklist.description: Runbook includes a step to visually verify the homepage in a browser (via browser MCP, preview URL, or equivalent) after the homepage push

checklist.name: Preview push after navigation phase
checklist.description: Runbook includes a step to push the theme to a preview or unpublished theme after the navigation/menus are wired (Phase 7)

checklist.name: Visual check after navigation
checklist.description: Runbook includes a step to visually verify the store after the navigation push

checklist.name: Two distinct checkpoints
checklist.description: The two visual review checkpoints are in different phases (one after homepage, one after navigation) — not merged into a single final check

checklist.name: Preview not live for review pushes
checklist.description: The visual review pushes target an unpublished or preview theme, NOT the live/published theme

checklist.name: --allow-live flag noted
checklist.description: Runbook mentions or includes the --allow-live flag (or warning about it) for any push to the live theme

checklist.name: Visual bug types identified
checklist.description: Runbook mentions at least two types of visual bugs to check for (e.g. misaligned cards, invisible buttons, text overlap, mobile layout)
